message:
fix: guard dolt remote subcommands against store init bypass (GH#2224)

bd dolt remote add/list/remove reach store initialization through an
unguarded Cobra parent-name path ("remote" instead of "dolt"). Add an
explicit needsStoreDoltGrandchildren guard so these commands are resilient
to future changes in noDbCommands, and add a structural test verifying
the registration and parent-name resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/refinery

Role: refinery
